heading: Administrative matters
label: 2004 Administrative matters
notes: CodificationSection was formerly set out as a note under .section 1681 of this title

children.heading: Administrative support
children.label: a Administrative support
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior shall provide all necessary administrative support to accomplish the requirements of sections 2002 and 2003 of this title.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
